ddls:
CREATE TABLE "language_usage" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language category */,
  "javascript" INTEGER /* Number of files written in JavaScript */,
  "java" INTEGER /* Number of files written in Java */,
  "cpp" INTEGER /* Number of files written in C&C++ */,
  "objc" INTEGER /* Number of files written in Objective-C&C++ */,
  "markdown" INTEGER /* Number of files written in Markdown */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of files written in other languages */,
  "ruby" INTEGER /* Number of files written in Ruby */,
  "xml" INTEGER /* Number of files written in XML */,
  "css" INTEGER /* Number of files written in CSS */,
  "shell" INTEGER /* Number of files written in Shell scripts */,
  "total" INTEGER /* Total number of files across all languages */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_usage_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_usage_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the software version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the software version was released */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the programming language */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the programming language */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the language was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the language was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_languages_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_language" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software version */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each programming language */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of files written in the programming language for the specific software version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id", "language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
